name: Debit Queen
overview: Ling Se dreams of independence but is thwarted by Xu Zilu, who outbids her to acquire a shop and tricks her into a marriage contract. Despite their rocky start, her kindness and business acumen win his respect, and as they face new challenges, their relationship deepens.

trailers.title: Debit Queen Trailer | 小财迷  | iQIYI
